description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a dark gable roof and a symmetrical, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a central entryway with a small overhang supported by brackets, flanked by tall, narrow windows. The brickwork is uniform, and the windows are arranged in vertical pairs on the side elevations, with a larger window grouping on the rear. The roof is steeply pitched and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing some eave overhang. The house has a modern yet traditional suburban appearance, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The entryway is slightly recessed, and the windows have a reflective, glassy finish.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and a central entryway with a small overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small overhang and three tall windows, two on the right and one above the door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two vertically aligned windows on the upper and lower floors, with the gable roof's slope visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large window grouping on the right and a single small window on the left, with the brick facade and roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two vertically aligned windows on each floor, mirroring the other side's window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows on the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small overhang, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
